"CVSS:3.1/AV:P/AC:H/PR:H/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-755", "name": "Improper Handling of Exceptional Conditions"}], "description": "rpassword maintainers were made aware of a possible issue with a partial password reveal when input is interrupted.

To quote @squell:

> @conradkleinespel I've confirmed this problem with SequoiaPGP, which I think uses rpassword, e.g.:
>
> Suppose we use pkill -9 sq in a different terminal right after the password has been typed in:
>
> $ sq key generate --userid "barf" --with-password
> Enter password to protect the key: Killed
> $ hello^C
>
> Where the password I typed in is "hello".

This has been fixed in version v7.5.0 and above.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2p6r-x3vv-xqm2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T21:49:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2p6r-x3vv-xqm2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2p6r-x3vv-xqm2"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-06T21:49:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/conradkleinespel/rpassword/security/advisories/GHSA-2p6r-x3vv-xqm2", "https://github.com/conradkleinespel/rpassword/releases/tag/v7.5.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2p6r-x3vv-xqm2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/conradkleinespel/rpassword/security-advisories/GHSA-2p6r-x3vv-xqm2", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/conradkleinespel/rpassword", "summary": "rpassword affected by partial password reveal when input is interrupted ", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T21:49:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2p6r-x3vv-xqm2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.5.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "rpassword"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 7.4.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: rpassword affected by partial password reveal when input is interrupted
